changes: Real-time player join/leave monitoring with browser sound alerts
Alert Players — get notified the moment specific players connect or disconnect
Full activity log with session history, name-change tracking, and powerful filters
Player Database — persists all seen players with name history and session counts across page loads
Population statistics: hourly trend tracking and next-hour prediction using linear regression
Alt account detection using session handoff pattern analysis (relay heuristic)
Player Notes — add private, persistent notes to any player
Keep-alive system — prevents background tab throttling with an optional watchdog popup to auto-reopen the tab
Auto-update checking against GitHub with toast notification and install link
Export activity logs, player database, saved players, and alert lists to JSON/CSV
Import player database to restore or merge historical data
Manual player add by ID — track players before they appear on your server
Debug console for advanced diagnostics and log export
Welcome popup on first install and changelog popup on future updates
